meta.note: Whether or not this value should persist across different environments. Should be checked for our data, and not checked for user generated data
Whether or not this value should persist across different environments. Should be checked for our data, and not checked for user generated data
Used to link the user to a corresponding user in Skolon.
A migrated user's reference to its stg app v1 counterpart
Whether or not this value should persist across different environments. Should be checked for our data, and not checked for user generated data
Used to link the organization to a corresponding school in Skolon.
This is a short url-friendly name for the organization. Only lowercase letters, dashes instead of spaces and no special characters (including ä, å, ö etc.)
A reference to stg app v1 for migrated organizations
How many times this reward can be granted? -1 means no limit.
The related Skolon entity name, e.g. "user" or "school".
Should not be edited. Developers know what the value here should be.
For developers only. If this has value, don't change it. If it doesn't have a value, no need to add anything here.
This is the actual field that should be used to determine who created the item. There is also user_created, but that will most likely be the system admin user we use in the API (can't be overridden).
